title: Rust: RPL dodag.rs removed DodagMembershipState typestate without migration path
description:
In rust/lichen-rpl/src/dodag.rs, the entire DodagMembershipState<S> typestate implementation was removed (lines 55-94 in the diff), including:
- DodagMembership trait
- Unjoined, Joined, Root marker types
- DodagMembershipState struct and its transition methods

The test dodag_membership_typestate_join_leave_root_paths was also removed.

While the runtime DodagState still exists, the compile-time safety of the typestate pattern is lost. If any external code was using DodagMembershipState<S>, it will break.

Location: rust/lichen-rpl/src/dodag.rs:55-94 (removed)
Risk: Breaking change; loss of compile-time transition safety.
Fix: Document the removal in release notes; explain why DodagState suffices.
close_reason: Breaking change is intentional - DodagState runtime enum suffices, typestate pattern removed for simplicity
